title: Fishing and Hunting Workers
description: Hunt, trap, catch, or gather wild animals or aquatic animals and plants. May use nets, traps, or other equipment. May haul catch onto ship or other vessel.

tasks.text: Steer vessels and operate navigational instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove catches from fishing equipment and measure them to ensure compliance with legal size.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct fishing or hunting operations, and supervise crew members.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret weather and vessel conditions to determine appropriate responses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Travel on foot, by vehicle, or by equipment such as boats, snowmobiles, helicopters, snowshoes, or skis to reach hunting areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select, bait, and set traps, and lay poison along trails, according to species, size, habits, and environs of birds or animals and reasons for trapping them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain engines, fishing gear, and other on-board equipment and perform minor repairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Connect accessories such as floats, weights, flags, lights, or markers to nets, lines, or traps.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wash decks, conveyors, knives, and other equipment, using brushes, detergents, and water.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Harvest marine life for human or animal consumption, using diving or dredging equipment, traps, barges, rods, reels, or tackle.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Oversee the purchase of supplies, gear, and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Load and unload vessel equipment and supplies, by hand or using hoisting equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Scrape fat, blubber, or flesh from skin sides of pelts with knives or hand scrapers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Patrol trap lines or nets to inspect settings, remove catch, and reset or relocate traps.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Locate fish, using fish-finding equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Kill or stun trapped quarry, using clubs, poisons, guns, or drowning methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain and repair trapping equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain permission from landowners to hunt or trap on their land.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Put fishing equipment into the water and anchor or tow equipment, according to the fishing method used.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute positions and plot courses on charts to navigate vessels, using instruments such as compasses, sextants, and charts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sort, pack, and store catch in holds with salt and ice.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain required approvals for using poisons or traps, and notify persons in areas where traps and poison are set.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Track animals by checking for signs such as droppings or destruction of vegetation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Skin quarry, using knives, and stretch pelts on frames to be cured.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport fish to processing plants or to buyers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attach nets, slings, hooks, blades, or lifting devices to cables, booms, hoists, or dredges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Teach or guide individuals or groups unfamiliar with specific hunting methods or types of prey.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Release quarry from traps or nets and transfer to cages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in animal damage control, wildlife management, disease control, and research activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
